title: V2T-CoT: From Vision to Text Chain-of-Thought for Medical Reasoning and Diagnosis

core_components: Preference localization mechanism for identifying key regions in descriptive text
Regional pixel-level attention mechanism for focusing on specific image areas
methodology.dataset: R-Med 39K (instruction-tuning dataset with multi-granularity reasoning paths)

challenges_addressed: Feature fusion limitations in existing models
Data and algorithm constraints in multimodal CoT methods

performance.improvements: Substantial improvements in both performance and interpretability
performance.comparisons: Outperforms existing models under comparable parameter sizes
